description: Style NoteSoft on the inside and sporty on the outside, you and these pants make a great pair. Designed using polyester fabric, this is perfect when you want that casual sporty look. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs, these pants allow easy movement and do not lose shape even after years. While the soft fabric keeps you cool, the polyester helps you stretch with much ease. Pair it with a t-shirt from the wide range available at myntra and achieve maximum performance on and off the field.Product DetailsBlack three fourth length pants with a mesh like fabric inside, an elasticated waistband and drawstring on the inside, two insert pockets on the sides, brand tab appliqued on the right pocket, embroidered logo on the left leg, printed logo at the back of the left leg and toggle straps at the hemMaterial and CareShell: 100% polyesterLining: 100% polyesterGentle machine wash in cool waterDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry at low temperatureWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32& rdquo ) is wearing a size M
